events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Celebrating the one and only Sir Mick Jagger today. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV changed the game! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first track played. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in the UK on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling British debut album at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's your go-to track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His music and legend live on forever. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55. His impact on music and culture is undeniable.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His guitar playing changed music forever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your top track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to Chrissie Hynde, the American-British singer, songwriter, and formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Chrissie Hynde, turning 75 today! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders are legendary. What's your favourite song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Happy 54th birthday to the unmistakable voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid is 54 today! Wishing a very happy birthday to Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite track he's sung?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 8, 1971, featuring his iconic title track.

angles.name: Imagine Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the 'Imagine' album. A timeless message of peace and hope. What does the song 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: The original Apple iPod, which revolutionised portable music, was introduced on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched the device that changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did yours hold?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The legendary Beatle was born in 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Happy 87th birthday to the iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, born in 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the legendary John Cleese on his 87th birthday! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from the comedy genius?

events.title: The Beatles release 'White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, universally known as 'The White Album', in the UK on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles' groundbreaking 'White Album' landed. A double album full of diverse tracks. Which one is your absolute favourite?
